name: Cracked Wheat Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Grease 12 muffin cups.
3. Mix cracked wheat and milk together and set aside for 10 minutes.
4. Sift together dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, salt, sugar).
5. Stir egg and shortening into the wet mixture with cracked wheat.
6. Gradually add the liquid to the dry ingredients, stirring only until combined. The batter will be lumpy.
7. Fill prepared muffin cups 2/3 full.
8. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes at 400°F.
